headlines.title: Authorities charge 31-year-old California man with attempted assassination of Trump
headlines.summary: Investigators charged a 31-year-old California suspect with trying to kill Trump and high-level officials at a Washington dinner using a gun. The incident affects US political security. Trial proceedings will follow, highlighting risks to leaders amid polarized climate.

headlines.title: Federal appeals court blocks Trump executive order suspending border asylum
headlines.summary: A three-judge US Court of Appeals panel ruled Trump's asylum ban illegal, restoring access for migrants at southern border. Asylum seekers and border states affected. Lower court decision upheld, impacting immigration enforcement and policy debates.

headlines.title: Justice Department adopts firing squads as permitted execution method
headlines.summary: US Justice Department authorizes firing squads and single-drug lethal injections to expedite capital punishment under Trump administration. Federal death row inmates affected. Policy enables 13 prior executions method, signals ramp-up in federal prosecutions.

headlines.title: US imposes sanctions on China refinery and 40 shippers for Iranian oil
headlines.summary: Trump administration sanctions major China-based oil refinery and 40 shipping firms transporting Iranian oil, escalating pressure on Tehran. Chinese firms, Iranian exports affected. Measures aim to curb oil revenue funding militias, affecting global energy markets.

headlines.title: Australia proposes 2.25 percent levy on tech giants unless they pay news outlets
headlines.summary: Australia drafts laws forcing Meta, Google, TikTok to compensate local publishers or pay levy on Australian revenue. News outlets and tech firms affected. Push supports media amid platform dominance, sets precedent for global content payments.

headlines.title: MSF accuses Israel of depriving Gaza Palestinians of clean water access
headlines.summary: Medecins Sans Frontieres reports Israel systematically weaponizes water in Gaza as collective punishment. 2.3 million Palestinians affected amid devastation. Highlights humanitarian crisis, calls for international intervention to restore supplies.

headlines.title: Trump administration fires all members of US National Science Board
headlines.summary: Trump fires entire 24-member National Science Board overseeing NSF research grants. Scientists and federal research affected. Move restructures government science policy, raises concerns over politicization of funding and expertise.

headlines.title: Mexican special forces capture Jalisco cartel leader El Jardinero
headlines.summary: Military nabbed El Jardinero, potential successor to killed leader El Mencho, hiding in a ditch. Cartel operations and Mexico security affected. Capture disrupts drug trafficking networks, boosts government anti-crime efforts.

headlines.title: NASA SpaceX Crew-10 launches four astronauts to retrieve stuck ISS duo
headlines.previousContext: Crew-10 rocket lifts off successfully Friday carrying McClain, Ayers, Onishi, Peskov; docking expected Saturday
headlines.summary: SpaceX Falcon 9 launched Crew-10 from Kennedy Space Center at 7:03 p.m. Friday to rotate ISS crew and return nine-month stuck astronauts Wilmore, Williams. Global space partners affected. Routine mission ensures continuous station operations.
